humanReadable.title: HELP for Domestic Workers — Free Legal Aid Eligibility
humanReadable.description: Confirms a foreign domestic helper currently in Hong Kong has an active or recently-terminated employment contract and a labor / legal / abuse case in progress. Used to gate access to HELP's pro-bono legal services without disclosing identity.
humanReadable.issuingOrg: Helpers for Domestic Helpers (St. John's Cathedral, Hong Kong; tel +852 2523-4020)

_note: policyHash is computed off-chain over this canonical JSON; CompassHub.registerPolicy stores the digest. Any whitespace / key-order divergence between off-chain canonical and on-chain digest invalidates the policy.
